# __MODULE_NAME__ Multi-Agent Investigations

Canonical index for multi-project and multi-TF documentation.

## Structure
- `registry/*`
- `projects/<project_alias>/ongoing.md`
- `projects/<project_alias>/note.md`
- `projects/<project_alias>/archive/`
- `projects/<project_alias>/tfs/<tf_id>/report.md` (single TF report)
- `projects/<project_alias>/archive/<tf_id>.tar.gz` (success-only bundle)

## Fast Onboarding
1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `docs/CONSTITUTION.md`
3. `docs/investigations_mo/registry/project_lock.yaml`
4. `docs/investigations_mo/registry/project_flow_branching.md`
5. `docs/investigations_mo/projects/__ACTIVE_PROJECT__/ongoing.md`
6. `docs/investigations_mo/projects/__ACTIVE_PROJECT__/tfs/__ACTIVE_TF__/report.md`
